Kara Bermejo

Currently leading product design at Groover—a platform that connects independent artists with the opportunities and services that help them grow their music. Previously Design Director at Splice. Before that, Meetup and The Knot.

I care deeply about shipping high-quality products that truly matter to people. That usually means caring about craft—building the right foundations, trusting intuition, practicing empathy, and bringing strong business instincts. It means experimenting, moving fast while staying strategic, and being equal parts IC, leader, and collaborator.
2023–Present GrooverUI

Groover's first production-ready design system — powering a multilingual, mobile-first marketplace for 50K+ artists and 3,500+ curators.

2025 App Design — Wellpath

End-to-end product design for a wellness & habit-tracking mobile app — research, wireframes, UI, and prototyping.

2024 Web Experience — Forma Studio

An immersive portfolio site for an architectural visualization studio with scroll-driven transitions.

2024 Campaign — Bloom Festival

Visual campaign for an annual arts & culture festival — posters, social assets, and environmental graphics.

2024 E-Commerce — Meraki Ceramics

Shopify storefront for a handmade ceramics studio — warm, tactile, and conversion-focused.

2023 Identity System — Noctis

Brand identity for a nightlife events company — logo, motion graphics, and merch design.

© 2026 Kara Bermejo
